Server-Side · CS2

Upex
Anti-WallHack for CS2

Advanced server-side protection that stops wallhack cheats by preventing unnecessary player data from ever reaching the client. Secure. Fast. Fair.

100%
Server-Side

Performance Impact
24/7
Protection

Core Features

Designed to eliminate wallhack advantages without compromising performance.

Server-Side Logic

All wallhack prevention happens on the server. No client modifications required.

Data Obfuscation

Hides enemy positions from clients that shouldn't have visibility, making wallhacks useless.

Lightweight & Fast

Optimized C# implementation with minimal CPU and memory footprint.

Easy Integration

Plug-and-play with Metamod:Source and CounterStrikeSharp. No complex setup.

Competitive Fairness

Restores fair play by removing the wallhack advantage from cheaters.

Always Up-to-Date

Compatible with modern CS2 server builds and actively maintained.

How It Works

Simple, effective, and invisible to legitimate players.

01

Detect Visibility

Server calculates which enemies are actually visible to each player.

02

Filter Data

Only visible enemy data is sent to the client. Hidden enemies are omitted.

03

Protect Integrity

Wallhacks receive no data for hidden enemies — they simply can't show what isn't there.

Why Choose Upex

Benefits that make a real difference for your server.

Effective wallhack prevention
Near-zero performance overhead
No client-side installation
Simple setup & maintenance
Restores competitive balance
Open-source & transparent

Protect Your Server Today

Join the community of server owners who trust Upex Anti-WallHack for fair, cheat-free CS2 gameplay.
